## What problem does this solve

The concrete problem in your workflow that this would address.

## Sketch of the solution

What the feature would look like in practice.

## Alternatives you've considered

If you've tried existing tools or workarounds, mention them.

## Surface

Which surface(s) would this apply to: CLI / Plugin / MCP / Desktop / Web /
All.
